mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing units starts above 2,100,000 signals a strengthening demand for housing that boosts consumer confidence and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with HOUST > 2100000 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate below 5.0% signals a tightening labor market that boosts wage growth and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with UNRATE < 5.0 are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in industrial production above 118.0 signals a strengthening supply chain that boosts economic growth and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with INDPRO > 118.0 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the federal funds rate and a 3-month increase in real GDP signal a synchronized easing monetary and demand cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real GDP above 10,900 billion and a 3-month increase in housing units starts above 2,100,000 signal a synchronized strengthening demand for housing and economic growth that boosts consumer confidence and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in periods with synchronized strengthening demand for housing and economic growth are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in industrial production above 118.0 and a 3-month increase in real GDP above 10,900 billion signal a synchronized strengthening supply chain and economic growth that boosts economic growth and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with synchronized strengthening supply chain and economic growth are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate below 5.0% and a 3-month increase in payroll employment above 132,800,000 signal a synchronized tightening labor market and economic growth that boosts wage growth and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with synchronized tightening labor market and economic growth are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
